title: Research Tag Descriptor
description: Optional descriptor for a tag used in section.tags arrays. Adding a file under tags/ documents the tag; tags without a descriptor still work, they just lack a description.

id.description: Filename-safe id; defaults to the filename basename. Equal to `tag` with `:` replaced by `-`.

tag.description: The literal tag string used in section.tags[]. May include one optional axis prefix (axis:value).

name.description: Human-readable name shown on tag pages.

description.description: Free-form prose explaining what the tag means and when to apply it.

axis.description: Optional grouping axis, e.g. 'family', 'off-cost', 'on-cost', 'granularity', 'domain'. Used by the static site to render axis-grouped comparison views. Anyone can introduce a new axis by using its name; there is no central registry.

aliases.description: Tag strings that have been merged into this canonical tag. Listed so old references and searches still resolve.

parent.description: Optional parent tag for hierarchical organization. The site may render parent → children relationships.

examples.description: Curated record ids that exemplify this tag. Advisory only; the site renders the full tag-page listing from section.tags[].
